$comment: Technique videos, each verified to exist via YouTube oEmbed at build time of this list. phase + (step OR section slug) places a video on its station; both empty = phase-general (shown in pre-flight). To add one: fill technique/phase/step-or-section/title/channel/videoId/note. Rebuild after editing. See CONTENT.md.

videos.technique: Cutting steel studs with aviation snips (score-and-snap)
videos.title: How To Cut Steel Studs Fast With Snips
videos.note: The flange-flange-web snip sequence that makes fast, clean cuts without power tools.

videos.technique: Cutting steel studs with a carbide-blade miter saw
videos.title: EASILY cut STEEL with a MITER SAW
videos.note: Blade choice, clamping, and feed rate for burr-free repetitive steel cuts on a miter saw.

videos.technique: Assembling a stud-and-track wall (layout, insert, square)
videos.title: Quick Metal Stud Framing Tutorial
videos.note: The core track-then-stud assembly workflow, seen once before you frame the first island wall.

videos.title: Master Metal Stud Framing & Drywall All Types Of Corners Lesson
videos.note: How pros build every corner type so the island's outside corners land solid and square.

videos.title: Installing Self Drilling TEK Screws In Metal | Fasteners 101
videos.note: Drill (not impact), moderate RPM, inline pressure, and stopping before you strip the steel.

videos.title: Using Tapcon Anchors the RIGHT WAY!
videos.note: Hammer-drill bit sizing, hole cleaning, and torque feel so base-track anchors bite instead of spin.

videos.title: How To Prime & Glue PVC Pipe The RIGHT WAY (Steps for a NO-LEAK Joint)
videos.note: Primer coverage, quarter-turn insertion, and hold time — the whole no-leak joint in one short pass.

videos.title: How to Make PEX Crimp Connections
videos.note: Ring placement, square crimp, and the go/no-go gauge check for the sink supply stubs.

videos.technique: Heat-bending PVC conduit: 90s, offsets, box offsets
videos.title: Heating and Bending PVC Conduit - BENDING 90s, OFFSETS, and BOX OFFSETS
videos.note: An electrician-teacher shows even heating and the exact offset bends the island's conduit runs need.

videos.technique: Wiring a GFCI receptacle (line vs load)
videos.title: How to Wire a GFCI Outlet - What's Line vs Load? - Electrical Wiring 101
videos.note: Line vs load terminals explained — the one mistake that silently defeats GFCI protection downstream. (Devices land at Phase 8 trim; wire is pulled in Phase 2.)

videos.title: How to Cut HardieBacker Cement Board (Clean, Easy Method) | Beginner's Guide to Score and Snap
videos.note: Dust-free score-and-snap with a straightedge and carbide scorer — no power tools required.

videos.technique: Fastening cement board to steel studs (BBQ island)
videos.title: Bbq Islands Installing  Cement Board over steel studs
videos.note: Exactly this build: hanging cement board on a steel-stud BBQ island, screw pattern included.

videos.title: Taping Cement Board Joints-Step By Step Tutorial
videos.note: Embedding mesh tape in thinset and knifing it flat so seams disappear under tile instead of humping.

videos.title: How To Waterproof Shower Walls ( RedGard )
videos.note: Roller technique and coverage cues — pink means wet, solid dark red means ready for the next coat.

videos.technique: Metal lath + scratch coat (curved stucco wall)
videos.title: Stucco scratch coat everything you need to know.
videos.note: A veteran plasterer's trowel pressure and scratching technique for the base coat over lath.

videos.title: The Best Way to Back Butter a TILE.   TileCoach Episode 32
videos.note: The flat-skim back-butter that gets full coverage under porcelain planks in seconds per tile.

videos.technique: Tile leveling clip system on walls
videos.title: How to use a Tile Leveling System for Walls
videos.note: Clips-and-wedges on vertical surfaces — the lippage control that matters most on plank tile faces.

videos.technique: Cutting porcelain planks on a wet saw
videos.title: How To Cut Tile With a Wet Saw - Ceramic, Porcelain, Stone, Glass & More
videos.note: Feed rate, support, and water management for chip-free wet-saw cuts in dense porcelain.

videos.technique: Angle-grinder cuts and notches in porcelain
videos.title: How To Cut Porcelain Tiles by Hand with Grinder without Chipping. Testing Diamond Blades 4 Tiling
videos.note: Grinder technique and blade comparison for the L-notches and cutouts a snap cutter can't make.

videos.title: Install & Clean Epoxy Grout Like a Pro: Kerapoxy CQ Application & Cleanup Guide
videos.note: Manufacturer's own float-and-wash sequence — timing the cleanup is the whole game with epoxy.

videos.title: How to install tile edge trim on walls: Schluter®-QUADEC profile
videos.channel: Schluter-Systems North America / Amérique du Nord
videos.note: Official Schluter demo: bedding the profile in thinset so tile edges finish clean at outside corners.

videos.title: DIY Tutorial: Prevent Tile Cracks with Silicone Joint Installation
videos.note: Where and how to substitute silicone for grout at changes of plane — essential outdoors with thermal movement.

videos.title: A Step-By-Step Guide on How to Use POP Rivets | Fasteners 101
videos.note: Rivet sizing, nozzle match, and the squeeze-to-snap feel for joining aluminum door and panel parts.

videos.technique: Propane leak test with soapy water
videos.title: How to Check for Gas Line Leaks on a Gas Grill | The Soap Bubble Test | BBQGuys.com
videos.note: The soap-bubble test on grill fittings, from a grill retailer — bubbles at any joint mean stop and refit.

videos.technique: Kamado built-in / table installation (ceramic feet, clearances)
videos.title: Installing my Kamado Joe into a table for the LAST TIME?  Kamado table install tips & tricks
videos.note: Setting a kamado into a built-in bay: lifting safely, ceramic feet, and clearance lessons learned.
